        <title>Jarrett Allen: Will remain out Wednesday</title>

        <description>Allen (knee) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Heat.

    <item>
        <guid>nba525573</guid>
        <title>Nikola Jokic: Delivers monster triple-double</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/nikola-jokic-3612</link>
        <description>Jokic finished with 23 points (9-16 FG, 0-1 3Pt, 5-7 FT), 17 rebounds and 17 assists in 35 minutes during Tuesday's 125-123 win over the Suns.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 24 Mar 2026 10:47:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>

        <title>Donovan Mitchell: Strikes for 42 points in victory</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/donovan-mitchell-4166</link>
        <description>Mitchell tallied 42 points (14-22 FG, 3-7 3Pt, 11-11 FT), two rebounds and three assists in 35 minutes during Tuesday's 136-131 win over the Magic.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
